diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -138,13 +138,13 @@
         x3 = self.layer3(x2)  # [batch, 1024, H/16, W/16]

         x4 = self.layer4(x3)  # [batch, 2048, H/32, W/32]

         

-        # ASPP path - FIXED: Now using x4 (2048 channels) instead of x3 (1024 channels)

-        aspp_out = self.aspp(x4)  # Pass x4 to ASPP instead of x3

+        # ASPP processing - FIXED: Now using x4 (2048 channels) instead of x3 (1024 channels)

+        aspp_out = self.aspp(x4)  # Pass x4 which has 2048 channels as expected by ASPP

         

-        # Decoder path

-        decoder_out = self.decoder(aspp_out, x1)  # Use x1 as low-level features

+        # Decoder processing

+        decoded = self.decoder(aspp_out, x1)  # Use x1 (256 channels) as low-level features

         

         # Upsample to original input size

-        out = F.interpolate(decoder_out, size=x.shape[-2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

+        decoded = F.interpolate(decoded, size=x.shape[-2:], mode='bilinear', align_corners=False)

         

-        return out
+        return decoded
